title: Jean Filetti
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Jean Filetti
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_titles: Director of the Teacher Preparation Program
education_entries: Ph D in English, University of Toledo
MA in English, University of Toledo
BS in English, Clarion University of Pennsylvania
research_interests: Shared Governance, Mentoring, American Literary Realism, Gender Issues, Teaching Pedagogy
teaching_interests: Professional Writing, Grant Writing, American Literature, Composition (all levels), Teacher Education
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2020). Huck and Jim's Island Time in Twain's Adventures of Huckleberry Finn and the Importance of Brave Spaces . Mark Twain Annual. Volume, 18. Issue, 1. Pages, 11-21.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2020). Helping Freshmen Revise: Collaborative Review Through the Eyes of Students . Virginia English Journal. Volume, 70. Issue, 1.
Journal Article, Professional Journal (2018). Discussion Boards in a Literature Classroom: Student Perceptions of Their Usefulness . Virginia English Journal.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2017). Reading Logs in an Age of Standardized Testing: The Challenges Facing Teachers . Interdisciplinary Humanities (journal published by the HERA).
Journal Article, Professional Journal (2015). Education on the Lower East Side in the Fiction of Myra Kelly . CEA Critic.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2013). Implementing Program Change: The Importance of Tying Learning Objectives to Accreditation . International Journal of Educational Organization. Volume, 19. Issue, 2. Pages, 19-27.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2012). "'Every Woman Can[not] be Won': Feminist Independence in Cahan's The Rise of David Levinsky" . The Explicator. Volume, 70. Issue, 4. Pages, 331-334.
Journal Article, Professional Journal (2011). Mentoring Probationary Faculty . Academic Leader. Volume, 27. Issue, 12.

Grants and Sponsored Research: Jean Filetti, George Kuster , Sara Lenhart, Lisa Webb, "Recruiting, Preparing, and Producing STEM Teacher-Scholars: The Christopher Newport University Noyce Scholarship Program," Sponsored by National Science Foundation
Sara Lenhart, George Kuster , Lisa Webb, Jean Filetti, "Preparing Highly-Qualified STEM Teachers: Supporting Student-Centered Instruction," Sponsored by National Science Foundation
Jean Filetti, "Linking Student Teaching and Induction," Sponsored by Office of Teacher Preparation, CNU, and NNPS
